response.justification: Senior full-stack engineer with 20+ years of development experience and 10+ years at senior level. Demonstrates strong mastery of the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS), proven architecture and software craftsmanship skills, and is currently working on AI-agent infrastructure—directly matching this role's requirements. Main gaps are lack of explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and Playwright experience, though foundational testing and backend framework knowledge is evident.
strengths: Extensive full-stack expertise with primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) directly matching job requirements
Currently developing AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, directly aligning with this specific requirement
Proven architecture and software craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD) demonstrated across multiple complex systems and roles
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned; Node.js background appears framework-agnostic rather than Nest-specific
Testing framework specifics (Vitest, Playwright) not mentioned; focus on testing evident but exact tool expertise unclear
Relational database work (PostgreSQL/MySQL) underrepresented compared to MongoDB emphasis in recent roles

key_factors.factor: Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development experience
Missing Nest.js, Vitest, Playwright explicit experience
